text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) 
— Cost and Use Segment research files. The guide includes several ways for users to quickly find the information they 
need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based on their SAS variable
